title: Crisp Herbal Slovakian Oysters Soup
description: A soothing Slovakian dish that combines the freshness of herbs with the richness of oysters, perfect for a cozy evening meal, ovo-vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chopped thyme and cook for 30 seconds.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add chicken broth and white wine, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add heavy cream and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the soup thickens slightly.
Stir in chopped parsley and dill. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve warm, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
